title: cerastium glutinosum f. pumilum
intro: Cerastium glutinosum f. pumilum, also known as a dwarf sticky mouse-ear, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and itching. In herbal preparations, Cerastium glutinosum f. pumilum is often used in the form of ointments, salves, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
